events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: the load/rigging setup at the observed radius doesn't reconcile with the load chart (DOC+ME mismatch) — a critical crane-capacity violation under OSHA 1926.1400. Marked `fail`, `critical` risk, `installed-defective`, with immediate stop-work and re-verification actions.
